model_specification_line: result = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible * post + C(birthyr) + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex) + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES + LFPR + UNEMP", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
